steps.name: procedural-lab-scene-composition
steps.summary: Added preset-specific Three.js visual-only scene compositions under Lab Visual Layer: flat-lab now has calibration seams/posts/stripes, instrumented-lab has gantry sensors/monitors/cables, and rough-terrain has visual curb blocks/barriers/hazard stripes. Verified npm build, g1-walk workbench, flat/instrumented/rough environment checks, and Playwright render smoke with guiCount=0, no bottom hint, distinct object sets, visualOnly=true, collision=none-threejs-only.

steps.name: visual-scene-evidence
steps.summary: Created experiments/131-visual-lab-scenes README and verify/visual-lab-scenes-smoke.json. Evidence aggregates g1-walk workbench plus flat/instrumented/rough environment summaries, confirms distinct preset object sets, required scene objects, visualOnly=true, collision=none-threejs-only, changedRuntime=false, and records the M31 boundary for physical terrain.
